description: Deterministic §Teach branch routing — one payload per branch in scripts/teach-route.mjs. Live-run by the shared eval runner via teach-route.mjs --payload=... --json.

cases.payload: the corpus chunk json now carries a derivation field recording its source demo
cases.rationale: A pure chunk-data fact lands in the substrate (corpus), not a skill reference.

cases.payload: add a new mcp tool inspect_chunk_keywords to the server
cases.rationale: New MCP tool / schema lands in the tool reference.

cases.payload: document the operator workflow for the feedback loop after a run
cases.rationale: An operator-side pipeline workflow lands in pipeline-ops.

cases.payload: add a new compose strategy called template-match to the engine registry
cases.rationale: A new strategy / engine lands in strategy-engines.

cases.payload: we retuned the strong_retrieval threshold constant
cases.rationale: A calibration constant / threshold tune lands in zettel-calibration.

cases.payload: a new way to lift a semantic fail by fixing the dominant pattern root
cases.rationale: A semantic-fail recovery pattern lands in semantic-fail-lifting.

cases.payload: a new fragment-graph node type alongside the leverage rule
cases.rationale: Fragment-graph / extraction knowledge lands in fragment-graph.

cases.payload: a new chunk authoring rule about html-first training signal order
cases.rationale: A chunk-authoring procedure rule lands in chunk-authoring.

cases.payload: a cross-cut corpus pitfall about synonym keyword coverage
cases.rationale: A corpus/retrieval pitfall lands in corpus-discipline.

cases.payload: a new pipeline anti-pattern rule for popover without trigger element
cases.rationale: A new anti-pattern rule lands in anti-patterns.

cases.payload: a recurring eval gap diagnosis pattern for coverage drop
cases.rationale: An eval-gap diagnosis pattern lands in eval-diagnostics.

cases.payload: a new posture principle that shifts how we approach the pipeline
cases.rationale: A methodology / posture shift lands inline in SKILL.md (the only branch that does).

cases.payload: a one-off debugging story for the journal that will not repeat
cases.rationale: An arc-specific story is the negative case — journal, never the skill.
